Users deposit and withdraw USDC.  - Vault deploys capital into BOLD/USDC LP + gauge.  - Withdraw fee: 0.3% on the TOTAL amount withdrawn (principal + profit).  - Harvest fee: 0.3% on the PROFIT only (user keeps all shares; no principal touch).  - Compound: 0% fee, user just pays gas.","errors":{"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol":{"keccak256":"0x09e3f1c72d4c5cbe8e2644ab7313f8f7177533ae2f4c24cdcbbeaf520a73734c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://93208401215d539fa2d81626b207c1f611def7883d0e447b3b5969ebaa7b3c2c","dweb:/ipfs/QmXPxDnQPx8LAweX5ZJqEcwkvs59kP4c64VVDG1Jjq1mef"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/SafeCast.sol":{"keccak256":"0x195533c86d0ef72bcc06456a4f66a9b941f38eb403739b00f21fd7c1abd1ae54","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b1d578337048cad08c1c03041cca5978eff5428aa130c781b271ad9e5566e1f8","dweb:/ipfs/QmPFKL2r9CBsMwmUqqdcFPfHZB2qcs9g1HDrPxzWSxomvy"]},"src/GranBoldUsdcVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1763d68fb9ee1f8000e216771e7a02ee43bd902a728c3821a80370e7471ec7b7","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://5b3266d7da7f3f03dcdfe8715da5280feb1706a7ee6b86b6ecad7e20ad88e9f0","dweb:/ipfs/QmPyvXoX4XZcz3Ny1A5d8zXF44GXwF8C2ESwh4cP8wj1Ai"]}},"version":1}

claimRewards(address[]).details: - `rewardTokens` is a list of reward token addresses the owner expects.  - Any token that is not USDC / BOLD / LP is transferred to feeRecipient.  - We intentionally do NOT treat rewards as part of vault TVL.

compound().details: - No tokens move.  - Principal is updated to current user value.  - Future profit is measured from this new baseline.

emergencyWithdraw().details: Can only be used when the vault is paused.

harvest(uint256,uint256,uint256).details: - Only PROFIT is used as base for the 0.3% fee.  - User keeps all their shares.  - After harvest, the user's principal is updated to their new    invested value, so they don't pay fee again on old profits.

params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which the tx must not be executed.
params.minBoldOut: Minimum BOLD expected from the USDC → BOLD swap.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which the tx must not be executed.
params.minNetAssetsOut: Minimum net USDC the user is willing to receive (after fee).
params.minUsdcFromDivest: Minimum USDC the user expects the divest to produce (slippage protection).

claimRewards(address[]).notice: Claim rewards from the gauge and sweep them to the feeRecipient.

compound().notice: Compounds profits into principal (no fee, just gas).

deposit(uint256).notice: Deposit USDC into the vault and receive vault shares.

emergencyWithdraw().notice: Emergency withdraw using only idle USDC (no divest).

investAllIdle(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Invest all idle USDC into the BOLD/USDC strategy.

recoverERC20(address,uint256).notice: Recover arbitrary ERC20 tokens that are NOT core vault assets.

totalAssets().notice: Total vault assets in USDC (idle + strategy).

withdraw(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256.notice: Withdraw USDC from the vault, burning shares.
